title: Code for the analysis of IsoSeq data to estimate ASIP gene expression in feathers of Eastern black-eared wheatear (Oenanthe melanoleuca) and Cyprus wheatear (Oenanthe cypriaca)
author: Fritjof Lammers
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0
description:
This repository contains the computational workflow to process IsoSeq data generated from regrowing feathers in wheatears. 
 This analysis is part of the manuscript  "A mosaic of modular variation at a single gene underpins convergent plumage coloration"  by Lutgen et al. (2025)
steps_raw:
This repository contains the computational workflow to process IsoSeq data generated from regrowing feathers in wheatears. 
 This analysis is part of the manuscript  "A mosaic of modular variation at a single gene underpins convergent plumage coloration"  by Lutgen et al. (2025)
